title: Take Me to Infinity

lyrics.text: Don't you know you're taking me higher?
lyrics.translation: 难道你不知道你让我感觉更开心吗

lyrics.text: Oh, you know you're making me sweat
lyrics.translation: 哦，你正让我感到汗流浃背

lyrics.text: Don't you know you're taking me further
lyrics.translation: 难道你不知道你正带我远去

lyrics.text: To places I have never been?
lyrics.translation: 到那我从未去过的地方

lyrics.text: Don't you know I'm nothing without you?
lyrics.translation: 难道你不知道没有你，我什么也不是

lyrics.text: Oh, you know I can't survive
lyrics.translation: 哦，你知道我不能生存

lyrics.text: Oh, you're showing me an adventure
lyrics.translation: 哦，你正在展现一场冒险

lyrics.text: Oh, you make me feel alive
lyrics.translation: 哦，你让我感到我还活着

lyrics.text: Oh something's taking over me
lyrics.translation: 哦，某些东西正要接管我

lyrics.text: Girl you know I can't breathe
lyrics.translation: 女孩，你知道我已经无法呼吸

lyrics.text: Oh, you're taking over me
lyrics.translation: 哦，你正在接管我

lyrics.text: Just take me to infinity
lyrics.translation: 就带我奔向无尽吧

lyrics.text: Take me to infinity
lyrics.translation: 奔向无尽

lyrics.translation: 奔向无尽
